raw_consumer_statement:
I won a chargeback against XXXXXXXX XXXX XXXX for {$370.00} because they failed to provide the product I paid for ( XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX  prescription from the exam, contact lenses I originally wanted. ) Despite the chargeback ruling in my favor, XXXX XXXX XXXX billing dept. is still attempting to collect the disputed amount directly by sending me bills to my mailing address repeatedly and ignoring my certified mail responses disputing their claims that I owe {$370.00}. 

I contacted Citi multiple times to ensure they uphold their chargeback decision and protect me from wrongful collection attempts. However, customer service repeatedly transferred me, put me on indefinite hold, and hung up on me. The Executive Office told me this was out of their hands and directed me back to a general dispute department that has done nothing to resolve the issue. 

XXXX XXXX XXXX has threatened collections for a charge that was already reversed. Citi must formally acknowledge in writing that I do not owe anything and that this chargeback stands. Citis failure to enforce their own chargeback ruling is allowing harassment and unfair collection practices against me. I need an immediate resolution.
